name: motor-escatologico-backend
description: Scripts de lint/format. Python usa Ruff (equivalente a ESLint + Prettier). Requer: pip install -e ".[dev]"

scripts.lint: python -m ruff check motor api tests
scripts.lint:fix: python -m ruff check --fix motor api tests
scripts.format: python -m ruff format motor api tests
scripts.format:check: python -m ruff format --check motor api tests
